g.title: T1: FPGA inserts 64-bit nanosecond timestamp at wire entry
T2: Hardware timestamp captured by NIC clock

g.text: P99.9 > 5us: Trigger RCA | P99.99 > 10us: Fatal Alert
CPU pinned to NIC NUMA node
